heading: Willfulness requirement for penalties against individuals
label: 21304 Willfulness requirement for penalties against individuals
text: A civil penalty under this subchapter may be imposed against an individual only for a willful violation. An individual is deemed not to have committed a willful violation if the individual was following the direct order of a railroad carrier official or supervisor under protest communicated to the official or supervisor. The individual is entitled to document the protest.
